package rulecoverage

func PositiveCookieWithoutSamesite() string {
    ruleID := "cookie_without_samesite"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`http.Cookie{...}` without `SameSite` set, particularly for auth/session cookies"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
